name: Amplitude
description: Amplitude is a digital analytics platform for understanding user behavior. Track events, query segmentation, funnels, retention, and user activity data, manage taxonomy, and export raw events.

capabilities.name: events_track
capabilities.description: Send event data to Amplitude via the HTTP V2 API for user behavior tracking.

capabilities.name: events_batch
capabilities.description: Upload large amounts of event data in batches (up to 2000 events per request).

capabilities.name: users_identify
capabilities.description: Set user ID or update user properties via the Identify API.

capabilities.name: events_export
capabilities.description: Export raw event data for a date range as a zipped archive.

capabilities.name: dashboard_active_users
capabilities.description: Get active and new user counts for a date range.

capabilities.name: dashboard_events_segmentation
capabilities.description: Query event segmentation data with filters and grouping.

capabilities.name: dashboard_funnels
capabilities.description: Analyze a conversion funnel between specified events.

capabilities.name: dashboard_retention
capabilities.description: Get retention analysis data for user cohorts.

capabilities.name: dashboard_user_activity
capabilities.description: Get the event stream for a specific user.

capabilities.name: dashboard_user_search
capabilities.description: Search for users by user ID, device ID, or Amplitude ID.

capabilities.name: dashboard_realtime
capabilities.description: Get real-time active user count.

capabilities.name: dashboard_revenue_ltv
capabilities.description: Get revenue and lifetime value data for a date range.

capabilities.name: dashboard_events_list
capabilities.description: List all event types tracked in the project.

capabilities.name: dashboard_sessions_average
capabilities.description: Get average session length for a date range.

capabilities.name: dashboard_chart_results
capabilities.description: Get data from a saved chart by chart ID.

capabilities.name: taxonomy_event_types_list
capabilities.description: List all event types in the taxonomy.

capabilities.name: taxonomy_event_type_create
capabilities.description: Create a new event type in the taxonomy.

capabilities.name: taxonomy_event_type_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing event type in the taxonomy.

capabilities.name: taxonomy_event_type_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an event type from the taxonomy.

capabilities.name: taxonomy_user_properties_list
capabilities.description: List all user properties in the taxonomy.

capabilities.name: taxonomy_categories_list
capabilities.description: List all event categories in the taxonomy.

capabilities.name: taxonomy_category_create
capabilities.description: Create a new event category.
